title: Mahindra Navistar is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Mahindra Navistar is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Mahindra Navistar invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mahindra Navistar:
Mahindra Navistar is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Navistar!
